Q90 quantile specialist
Tanaka red-team: shifts ALL
predictions up, not just extremes
149 extreme samples insufficient

Advisor area of work
Paper 2 or 3

Temporal stationarity testing
No year-over-year validation
Required for deployment claims

span.p:
Log1p retest with extremes
Box-Cox 0.2 confirmed final
Log1p does NOT fix extremes

span.p: Strategic Decisions

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stop improving, start writing
All 4 reviewers unanimous
Submitted 0.80 beats unsubmitted 0.83

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Three-paper strategy
1. Zenodo dataset deposit
2. JOSS software paper
3. WRR research paper

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Three-tier product output
Screening: zero-shot, wide CIs
Monitoring: N>=10, medium CIs
Publication: N>=30, tight CIs

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Geographic bias identified
CA+OR+KS = 50% of candidates
Zero: loess belt, iron range, arid SW
35-site gap-fill plan designed

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Key Scientific Findings

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Dissolved vs particulate boundary
Particle params transfer cross-site
Dissolved do not, physics limit
Per-site OLS ceilings 0.04-0.06

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Nobody uses turbidity in
large-scale ML models
All published work uses hydromet only
Continuous turb is THE advantage

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Song et al 2024 benchmark
377 sites LSTM PUB R2=0.55
murkml R2=0.80, delta +0.25

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Death of OLS
CatBoost + 2 samples R2=0.48
beats USGS OLS + 50 samples R2=0.40

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Iowa River SSC/TP split
SSC fails R2=-0.50, TP works R2=0.69
Turb tracks fine P-bearing fraction
Publishable finding

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GKF5 vs holdout disagreement
turb_Q_ratio: +0.004 GKF5 vs -0.102 holdout
CV folds lack geology diversity
Major methodological finding

span.p: Paper Ready

MedR2=0.402 CI 0.358-0.440

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

7 models, all worse than v4
Model knows via SHAP rank 3

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Exp B - Site exclusion
Pooled up 0.211 to 0.324
Per-site DOWN 0.290 to 0.236
Aggregate metrics lie

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Exp C - Flow stratification
NOT a flow problem
Site heterogeneity at ALL regimes

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Exp D - Site count
200 sweet spot, 96 too few
Pooled and per-site tell
OPPOSITE stories at every scale

v8-post Bayesian
N=3 R2=0.485
Zero-shot preserved at 0.472
BREAKTHROUGH

Old 2-param linear

No shrinkage, overfits

slope+intercept N over 10

Cap reporting at N=10

NTU investigation
89 dual-sensor sites found
Zero temporal overlap
NTU=1976-2005, FNU=2006+
Panel unanimous: validation only

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Noise site analysis
Drop 15 worst: first flush
R2 collapses 0.905 to 0.264
NEVER drop training sites

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Data cleaning
135 anomalous records removed
SSC/turb ratio above 200 or below 0.01
Includes SSC=70000 at turb=260

span.p:
3-way split created
284 train / 76 holdout / 36 vault
47+ ablation exps = implicit overfit
Krishnamurthy identified
